events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: gas flex connector through cabinet wall. This is a water heater service call. A gas flex connector running through a cabinet wall is non-compliant and hazardous. Gas connectors should not be run through walls/cabinet walls. This is a code violation and safety hazard. Work is in-progress. Decision should be fail. Risk high/critical. Component condition: installed-defective, non-compliant. Actions: stop work, reroute gas connector properly, do not pass through cabinet wall.

    "Stop work immediately and isolate gas supply",
    "Remove flex connector from cabinet wall penetration",
    "Reroute gas piping with approved rigid piping or proper connector routing outside concealed spaces per OEM and code",

  "rationale": "A gas flex connector passing through a cabinet wall is a code violation and serious gas-leak/fire hazard. Flexible gas connectors must not be routed through walls, floors, partitions, or concealed spaces. Work cannot continue until the connector is removed and the gas supply is rerouted in a compliant manner.",
